catalog.name: Email Distribution List
catalog.description: Create or modify a distribution list

catalog.name: New User Onboarding
catalog.description: Full IT onboarding for a new hire

knowledge.title: How to reset your Windows password
knowledge.summary: Step-by-step guide to reset your corporate Windows password using the self-service portal.
knowledge.body: Open the self-service portal at https://reset.servicegpt.io, enter your email, complete MFA, and choose a new password meeting policy.
knowledge.author: IT Support

knowledge.title: Connecting to VPN from macOS
knowledge.summary: Configure the corporate VPN profile on macOS Sonoma.
knowledge.body: Download the .mobileconfig from the portal, double-click to install, authenticate with corporate SSO.
knowledge.author: Network Team

knowledge.title: Outlook keeps asking for password
knowledge.summary: Resolve repeated password prompts in Outlook desktop.
knowledge.body: Clear cached credentials from Credential Manager, restart Outlook, sign in with SSO.
knowledge.author: Application Support

knowledge.title: Best practices for SLA management
knowledge.summary: Internal guide to staying within SLA targets on P1/P2 incidents.
knowledge.body: Acknowledge within 15 minutes, communicate every 30 minutes, escalate to tier 2 if not resolved within target.
knowledge.author: IT Operations

notifications.title: Welcome to ServiceGPT
notifications.message: Your portal is ready. Explore the catalog to get started.

notifications.title: Incident assigned
notifications.message: INC0001001 has been assigned to your group.

chatMessages.text: I want to create an incident

I can open this incident in one of these instances:
1. CRISP - Security Incident (dev352459)
2. NATAMA/CAPTURE - NBN Incident (dev208811)
3. MyServices - Request Item (dev305710)
4. AskUs - HR Request (dev392710)
5. ITAM Request - Internal incident (dev386084)
Reply with the number of the instance you want to use.
Selected instance: AskUs - HR Request. What short description should I use for this incident? Reply with a new short description, or say "same" to keep: "I want to".
same
Great — what priority should this incident have? Critical, High, Moderate, or Low?
low
Got it. I'll open this incident with short description "I want to" and priority Low. Reply "yes" to confirm and create the incident, or "no" to cancel.
yes
I could not create the incident. ServiceNow is not configured for the selected instance.

I can create incidents in ServiceNow if you say "create incident <describe issue>". For general chat, the GPT engine is not configured yet — ask the admin to set GEMINI_API_KEY or GOOGLE_API_KEY (for Gemini), or ANTHROPIC_API_KEY (for Claude) in backend/.env.
